reviews.text: We had to search for a new accountant to process both our corporate and individual tax returns this year and Pastran PA was recommend to us. I had already done some online research and they were on my list of local accountants to reach out to. After my initial phone call I was already sure that I would like to use them. From that day on we received amazing service from them. I had several questions about new things that we had come across this past year and they were very patient with me, quick with responses, and efficient in their work. I highly recommend using them.  Thank you to everyone at Pastran PA! Keep up the great job!!
Debbie is the best tax attorney in Miami and Homestead
Her knowledge and willingness to help makes a big difference in any situation where you need someone to be on your side. Best Lawyer in Homestead.

Cristina and her team were an absolute dream to work with on a recent closing. They were incredibly responsive, knowledgeable, and always quick to answer any questions my client had. Cristina truly goes above and beyond — not just for her clients, but for the community as well. She has even taken my emergency calls in the evenings and on weekends without hesitation.  Her heart for serving the community really shows. Highly, highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!  It’s always a smooth experience working with you and your clients.

reviews.text: Where do I even start? I went in expecting a quick claim deed, and I ended up saving $45,000 because she caught something I had no idea about. She noticed a potential PACE loan issue and actually took the time to explain it. Long story short, she helped me fix a huge mistake and cut down my escrow by over $5,600 a year. Hands down the most professional experience I’ve had. Her response time? Spot on. And honestly, she’s just a genuinely good person. Couldn’t recommend her more! Thank you so much!
Very thorough, professional, and efficient—exactly what one should want in an attorney.
Cristina, Jackie, Angie and the entire staff are wonderful. Every interaction I’ve had with them has been great.  Highly recommend.

We've had the greatest pleasure of working with Jacqueline for our estate planning. Not only have I sent my father and sister in law to her but I've been talking about the services you offer to everyone at my job. It is such an amazing feeling and weight off of your shoulders knowing that you can rely on this firm to help you put your affairs in order. We are extremely grateful for Jacqueline's time, attention to detail, and guidance through it all. 🙏

I'm grateful to Jackie Martinez and Pelaez Maas Law for assisting with my mother’s estate planning. Since I live in Georgia and my mother is in Florida, finding a reliable law firm was essential. We chose Pelaez Maas Law based on strong recommendations from a friend. Meeting Jackie confirmed we’d made the right choice; she carefully listened to our concerns, explained Florida law, and offered guidance on our next steps. Jackie and her team broke things down in simple terms and addressed every question we had. Throughout the process, Jackie demonstrated genuine care, transparency, and integrity—always acting in her clients' best interests. I wholeheartedly recommend her and the team at Pelaez Maas Law.
Thank you to this wonderful team for your professionalism and legal assistance.
Very sweet , attentive and Proffessional . She made sure I understood each document I was signing ..I will definitely recommend you guys come here.. we were extremely satisfied today !
Great experience with Excellent service.  Very knowledgeable and helpful.  Mrs. Pelaez was very professional!

I had the upmost pleasure of working with Pelaez Maas Law PLLC on a recent business closing, and we couldn’t be more pleased with their professionalism, responsiveness, and efficiency throughout the entire process.
As a fellow law firm, we truly appreciate clear communication, attention to detail, and a collaborative approach. Their team demonstrated that. A special shout-out to Sandra and Cristina, whose expertise, responsiveness, and steady guidance helped ensure a smooth and successful closing. Their professionalism and dedication were evident at every step.
It was truly a pleasure working alongside such capable and committed professionals. We look forward to future opportunities to collaborate.
Cristina made our estate planning process easy, she explained every option so that we could make the best choices for us and our family.  Highly recommend!

I was highly satisfied with my recent real estate transaction, thanks to Cristina's professionalism and her attentive team. Their commitment and dedication made me feel confident throughout the process. I would readily recommend Pelaez Maas Law for knowledgeable and reliable real estate legal services.
Professional service in a very comfortable and friendly environment.
Thank you Pelaez Maas Law for your excellent service. We are grateful that we found you. Great communications, detail oriented and get the business done!

My dad, Roque Pérez, and I needed this firm to take care of his estate planning. He met with Ms. Jacqueline Martinez Regueira and had a very pleasant meeting. She was efficient, friendly and helpful. We are grateful to have had such a positive experience.

Cristina came HIGHLY recommended by a coworker. I was overwhelmed so I used the recommendation as time was of the essence. Cristina is extremely knowledgeable, dedicated, and very friendly- truly felt like family. She walked me through every step of my closing and explained things in terms I could understand. I felt very well taken care of and trust that this is just how she is with all clients. She made me feel like a priority and plan on using her again should the need arise. Can’t recommend her enough!!

Cristina is the absolute best! She made my real estate closing smooth, stress-free, and even enjoyable (which I didn’t think was possible). She’s super knowledgeable, explained everything in plain English, and was always quick to respond to my questions. You can tell she genuinely cares and wants the best for her clients. If you’re buying or selling property, do yourself a favor and call Cristina—you’ll be in great hands!
I highly recommend Pelaez Maas Law for real estate legal needs. Very pleasant, very helpful.
Excellent professionals warm cordial service from attorney Jacqueline Martinez Regueira!

I have known Cristina Pelaez for several decades. As a Florida Bar board certified real estate lawyer, she is my go to attorney for residential transactions and complex commercial transactions that I need to refer.  She’s knowledgeable, practical, resourceful, and responsive. Her attention to detail and commitment to client service are unmatched. I enthusiastically recommend Cristina and her team at Pelaez Maas Law.

My wife and I went in for a consult with jacqueline. She was totally rude, dismissive, wouldn't even let my wife finish a sentence  or her questions. Altogether, she just seemed like she didn't want to be there. I suggest you take your money elsewhere
reviews.ownerResponse: Good morning, Alfred.  I am sorry you had a negative experience with our office.  I would like the opportunity to discuss this matter with you personally to see how we can improve your experience.  Please reach out to Candy, our receptionist, to set up a phone call with me or you can email me directly at cristina@pelaezmaaslaw.com. - Cristina M. Pelaez, Esq.

reviews.text: Working with Mrs. Cristina Pelaez of Pelaez Maas Law was a pleasure.  She understands your needs and helps work towards an expedited closing. She is very knowledgeable in her field and answered all the questions I had.  The law firm can not only help with the closing of the real estate transaction but can also help to review and contracts prior to signing and loan documents. i would highly recommend their services.

We have had the pleasure of working with the PelaezMaas law firm for mulitple years and our clients are always pleased with their professionalism and I as well with our own properties. I highly recommend them to anyone who is looking to buy or sell real estate. Thank you!

I have retained the services of Pelaez Maas Law for both personal and business purposes and am completely satisfied with the level of expertise and professionalism exhibited by attorney Pelaez and her team.  I highly recommend Pelaez Mass Law.

To be honest I've haven't had to many people make me feel like family outside the family. I thank you for the hospitality, beyond grateful for the outcome and highly recommend this team and the rest of the staff for any of you're future situations especially if you're not sure how to handle what has come about. They will give you a free consultation and if you feel you need a lawyer that will take you in and get the ball rolling. Just be honest and upfront they will take care of you thats a Promise! So Mr. Renick and Mrs. Jackie Thank You and I will keep in touch!!!

The law office of Stephen Renick experience has been a great one. Mr. Renick made me feel like family. I could call as many times and was always well informed on my case. I recommend Mr. Renick to anyone who is in need of a professional, responsive, and caring attorney.

I got so lucky to have Mr. Renick and Jackie to help me in a bad situation with my job!! I was so lost with what to do with workmans comp, my injury and what Drs to see. They made things very simple for me. They are very knowledgeable and their support and advice was priceless. You always feel connected and in the loop. Mr. Renick and Jackie don't sleep. Lol They work around the clock to answer their clients emails and calls. They treat you like family. I would highly recommend hiring him! They work hard for the employees like you and me. I was very please and grateful with my results! Thank you from the bottom of my heart, especially during a pandemic. 😊💙

reviews.text:
How shall I start this? From day one I was freightened about the entire process of protecting myself and my rights, and from day ONE it has been surreal at how simple and easy and most importantly, UNDERSTANDABLE. Mr. Renick and Ms. Mendoza have been professional, courteous, understanding, and at times my voices of reason when I would start freaking out about the process. I HIGHLY recommend Stephen Renick to anyone who is reading this and question g where they should go. I remember how hesitant you were when you first came into my office, and I made sure you were not pressured. As time went on, you realized that I was correct that the insurance company nor the Employer were going to protect your interests. I am glad I was able to assist you on your case.

reviews.text: We are so grateful and pleased with the excellent work done by paralegal Ana Resendez and attorney Vanessa Baez on our case to obtain my adjustment of status through marriage. My husband and I truly felt we were in the hands of professionals; we received answers to all our questions and they were always attentive to our case! reviews.text: I am incredibly grateful to attorney Vanessa Baez. Her excellent work and handling of the case in court helped secure my political asylum application. I highly recommend her. Thanks to her, my son and I will be able to establish residency in this wonderful country in the future.

I want to share with you the experience my husband Oswaldo and I, Lunnys, have had with the lawyers at SANABRIA & ASSOCIATES. My name is Gloria Escalante, Venezuelan, and I want to attest through this medium that I have been served since 2019 with great satisfaction by SANABRIA.& ASSOCIATES HOMESTEAD office 174 NE 8TH ST, my assigned lawyer Vanesa and my Paralegal Margarito, are two angels that GOD put in my path to be able to achieve 1st. TPS Approval. 2nd. Work Permit 3rd. PERMANENT RESIDENCY. They are the best advisors, concerned and very honest, the success of each case is to get to them as soon as possible all the documents they require as soon as possible. Giving them 5 Stars ✨ is few because they deserve complete heaven. Infinite grace, thank you, thank youeeees. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND THEM

I appreciate the service they offered me at the Homestead office, always with a good reception to the client and in my case the Attorney Vanessa who at all times was aware of each process and Marianito at all times concerned about my case and with much kindness towards us obtaining my residence super fast for me they are the best

Extremely grateful, excellent service from attorney Vanessa Báez, paralegal María Elena Rojas, and CSR Franccesca Brown. Today we won my immigration court case, and the firm's service was so effective that we received congratulations from the prosecutor. I wholeheartedly recommend them. Thank you.

My husband and I are very grateful for the excellent service provided by Sanabria & Associates, especially attorney Vanessa and paralegal Margarito Cruz, who are assisting us. We have been delighted with their service and attention from the very beginning. Thank you for your patience and for answering all our questions and concerns. I wholeheartedly recommend Margarito, who is always attentive and answers our questions without leaving us with any unanswered questions, and attorney Vanessa for all her time, dedication, and professionalism. Thank you!

100% Recommended. Since I began my asylum case, I have been assisted by paralegal Alejandra Leal and attorney Vanessa Baez at Sanabria and Associates, who have guided and helped me promptly in every situation I've encountered. I'm glad to be in the hands of experienced professionals. God bless them.
I am very grateful for the work of Margarito, the lawyer Vanessa, and Francesca at reception; they are all excellent, and I thank them very much for everything.

I want to thank the Sanabria & Associates team, especially attorney Vanessa Báez and paralegal Alejandra Leal, for their support during my political asylum process. Without a doubt, Vanessa's preparation and experience ensured that my husband and I received final approval for our asylum application flawlessly. We came to Sanabria after our previous attorney asked us to drop our case at the prosecutor's suggestion, as he indicated we had a frivolous case. This all happened the day before our hearing. But by a stroke of luck, the judge decided to postpone the hearing on the very day it was scheduled, allowing us to change lawyers and join Sanabria & Associates. They appointed attorney Vanessa as our representative, whom I admire for her professionalism, humility, and dedication. Eternal thanks, Vanessa. Thank you, Sanabria & Associates. 1000% recommended.

I want to thank you for your excellent work and support. You are an exceptional team. I especially want to thank Mr. Margarito Cruz for all his support, patience, and determination in following up on my case. Thank you all so much, may God bless you and may you continue doing your excellent work.
Excellent team, excellent defense💯💯💯💯💯💯💯

reviews.text:
I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional service and support provided by Tiffany Chambers at Gonzalez P.A., our immigration attorney. My brother was facing a challenging and stressful situation, having been detained by ICE in Guantanamo Bay. Communication was extremely limited, making the situation even more complex.

I had consultations with five other attorneys, and sadly, most had no clue how to handle such a unique and difficult case. Tiffany, however, stood out as the exception among many attorneys in the State of Florida. From the very first consultation, she demonstrated remarkable expertise, compassion, and dedication to his case.

She navigated the complex legal system with skill and kept me informed at every step of the process. Her deep understanding of immigration law and her strategic approach were instrumental in securing my brother's deportation to Nicaragua, which was the best possible outcome for him given the circumstances.

Tiffany's professionalism and commitment to her clients are truly commendable. I highly recommend Tiffany Chambers to anyone in need of a knowledgeable and compassionate immigration attorney. Thank you, Tiffany, for your outstanding work and for making a difference in our lives!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your powerful story and kind words. We’re honored to have been able to support your family through such a difficult and complex situation. Tiffany is deeply committed to every case she handles!

reviews.text:
Hi All,

My name is Jesse and if I could add 5 more stars to this post it would not begin to tell you about how I feel about the treatment I received from Dr. Neil Bressler. If you are suffering please do your self a favor and take minute to read this post. I injured my back over 30 years ago in an accident and would often either experience episodes of pain reinjuring my back leaving me laid up for a day or so before I could walk again. Well, my Bressler story started 14 years ago right before my daughter was born. I was in the gym getting in an early workout (back day🙂 if you can beleive it) I thought,  feeling great let me go a little heavier and it was during a set I heard what I can only explain as a pop which left me later that day unable to stand and progressively got worse. At one point I can recall screaming in pain for over 4 to 5 hours (not exaggerating, l just had my wife confirm :). Well the pain continued like this for weeks and I grew what I think people call depressed feeling helpless. I recall praying and asking GOD for help (Thank you GOD for helping me). It was that same day I was told about Neil by my sister who said I should go see him. I told her, I had surgery and have been to so many doctors but then I recalled my prayer and thought what If this is the answer, and so what I think was crawling I made my way over to the Dr's office. He was friendly and kind but I was miserable and not in the mood. He ran me through the talk and informed me he needed to perform an x-ray before we could think about treatment. It that same day, he reviewed the films and tried his best to keep me comfortable. I recall him saying he thought he could help me, so he proceeded with the treatment and made the first adjustment (oh man). Well, It was not what I expected as I was still bent over but after returning home my wife left me for a few minutes and I had to go to the rest room and thought how am I going to make it. So I tried to stand on my own using the side of the couch as support but found I could now stand straight and only sore not pain (Hard to explain). I quickly picked up my cell and called the office telling him I can stand I can stand. He told me he would need to see me again but if I could commit I would make further improvements. Well I am blessed and so Thankful to GOD and for him sending me to Dr. Bressler. I am now able to work out pain-free! Including squats but always carefully (pretty heavy). If you are in need of a great chiropractor and looking for a recommendation get over to see Dr. Niel Bressler you will not regret it.
reviews.ownerResponse: I truly appreciate you and your kind words. I am so happy you made it to me and that I could help.you. you have been a friendly fa e ND a true friend since the day we met. I'm always here for you. Looking forward to seeing you

As a Holistic Stress Management Specialist, I was skeptical to receive treatments from a Chiropractor. During my first visit, Dr. Bressler greeted me with a charming smile and a warm sense of humor. Over the past 3 months, I have developed not only a healthy relationship with all staff, but new friendships. I always leave smiling, laughing and grateful to be supported from start to finish.

I don’t mean to intrude all the good comments about this place but I came here to began therapy on my lower back because I was recently in a really bad car accident and when I went, the doctor didn’t even look at me twice. It was fine until I saw a cigarette butt in a corner of the room and in his office where I went. Later when I was doing my vibraaw exercise, he was smoking hookah in his other office behind me. It was so disturbing as someone who quit smoking years ago. Just wanted to put my opinion out there. Thanks

I moved to South Florida from out of state into a nightmare scenario at an apartment where my neighbors partied to all end of the early morning and after trying to work with management for over four months I turned to the pros for help. I am grateful for the help I received from the team at Flaxman Law Group. Throughout our email correspondence, they were incredibly responsive and always made sure to get back to me in a timely manner. They truly took the time to listen to my concerns and clearly understood the complexities of my situation. I appreciated how they provided thoughtful recommendations and guided me toward the best possible solutions for my case. I highly recommend their services to anyone looking for a professional, attentive, and supportive legal team. Although I hope to never need them again, they would definitely be my first choice if I did.
I think Charles flaxman is the best injury lawyer in town. I highly recommend him
